description: Acme Co upgraded from Growth to Enterprise tier effective April 2025. Adds $1,600 expansion MRR; no change in logo count.

Initech LLC was acquired by Globex Corp; subscription S003 transferred to Globex effective July 2025 at unchanged terms ($900/mo Growth). Initech logo count drops by 1 and Globex logo count rises by 1 in July, but this is not real churn or new business -- same contract, same MRR, continuous service.

Brightline Inc's September 2025 invoice was processed late and recognized in October instead. Contracted MRR for S002 is unaffected ($450/mo throughout); recognized revenue shows a $450 dip in September and a $450 spike in October for this customer.
Vandelay Industries signed as a new logo, Starter plan, effective February 2025.
Pied Piper signed as a new logo, Starter plan, effective May 2025.
Dunder Mifflin canceled at end of contract term effective August 31 2025. Real churn: $400 MRR lost, logo count drops by 1 in September. Not related to any transfer or reactivation.
